ProductLaunchFormula.com 	© 2017 Internet Alchemy, Inc.
Module 1 – your launch goals
Your launch goals Worksheet
“If you don’t know where you’re going, any road will get you there.”
You have to figure out what you want out of your launch, then build your strategy around
your goals. You might even have more than one goal, and that’s okay. Use this worksheet
to help you document your goals for your first launch.
Possible Goals:
¨ To make money (if this is your goal, say “I want to make X number of dollars”)
¨ To save the world (get your work out there, help people, make a difference, make
an impact)
¨ Build proof that your product or service works
¨ Build social proof
¨ Attract JV Partners and Affiliates
¨ To create a product
¨ To build your list
¨ To gather data/research/split test
¨ To create influence or influence other people
¨ To get in the door and make a presentation
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
